name: Ember
description: Burns your target dealing 10 damage instantly and 1 damage per tick

name: Zap
description: Surprise your target with a sudden jolt dealing 10 damage and interupts your target

name: Smolder
description: Sets your target alight, dealing 7 damage per tick

name: Shock
description: Shocks your target with high energy dealing 43 damage

name: Poison
description: Poisons your target dealing 3 damage per tick

name: Toxic Gas
description: Poisons up to 4 opponents near your target, dealing 8 damage per tick

name: Fever
description: Delivers a nasty fever to your target, dealing 7 damage per tick.

name: Infection Cloud
description: Infects up to 9 nearby enemies dealing 11 damage per tick.

name: Frost
description: Suddenly freezes your target, dealing 16 damage and lowering ac by 12 points for 6 ticks

name: Chill
description: Chills your target dealing 27 damage and slowing their attack speed by 5 percent

name: Kick
description: Kick your target, interrupting them and dealing your boots AC as damage

name: Strike
description: Swing your weapon at your target, Dealing 750 percent primary dps.

name: Lifetap
description: Steals your target's life force, dealing 16 points of damage and healing you for the damage dealt.

name: Dread
description: Instills a deep dread into your target, lowering their strength by 10 and dealing 4 damage per tick.

name: Throw Stone
description: Throw a stone at your target dealing 5 damage

name: Snipe
description: Take time to carefully aim your shot at your target, Deals the same damage your bow would do in 9 seconds and has 1.5x accuracy.

name: Basic Healing
description: Heals your target for 17 points

name: Languid Healing
description: Heals your target for 10 points after a 2 tick delay

name: Woodskin
description: Protects you against 13 points of damage

name: Minor Magic Barrier
description: Protects your target from 20 points of damage.

name: Tepid recovery
description: Heals your target for 5 per tick

name: Desperate recovery
description: Heals your target for 1466 points per tick

name: Divine Aura
description: Surrounds you in a divine aura, absorbing all forms of damage that deal less than 15 percent of your max hp

name: Lay on Hands
description: Lays your healing hands on your target, healing for 600 points

name: Harm Touch
description: Grips your target in agony, dealing 200 damage

name: Breeze
description: Converts 1 point of endurance into 2 percent of max mana per tick.

name: Minor Manaflow
description: Transfers some of your mana to your target, granting them 30 points of mana

name: Life Ebb
description: Converts 4 percent of max hp to 1 percent of max mana per tick.

name: Minor Regeneration
description: Heals your group for 3 points and draining 5 mana per tick.

name: Sturdy Footing
description: Protects you from 12 percent of incoming melee damage, at the cost of 1 point of endurance per attack.

name: Duel
description: Forces you and your target into a one on one duel. While in the duel, participants have melee damage is doubled and neither participant can flee the fight, cast spells, be healed, or be damaged by anything outside of the duel. The duel ends after 6 ticks or when one of the participants dies.

name: Passive Protection
description: Wards your group against 1 point of damage on every attack.

name: Minor Fortify Attack
description: Increases your effective weapon damage by 1. Costs 2 point of endurance per tick

name: Concentration
description: All spells deal 8 percent additional damage. Costs 2 point of endurance per tick

name: Willpower
description: All heals and wards are 8 percent more potent. Costs 2 point of endurance per tick

name: Blade Turn
description: Protects you from 1 physical attack, recharging every 30 seconds. Consumes 5 endurance to refresh if the charge is used.

name: Manatap
description: Steals 11 points of the targets' mana

name: Yawn
description: Makes your target tired, damaging their endurance points by 10

name: Courage
description: Grants your group 15 max hp and 4 ac

name: Thoughfulness
description: Increases your groups charisma intelligence and wisdom by 10.

name: Brawn
description: Increases your groups strength and stamina by 12

name: Nimbleness
description: Increases your groups agility and dexterity by 12

name: Haste
description: Increases your groups haste by 5 percent

name: Alacrity
description: Increases your groups casting speed by 5 percent

name: Summon Bear
description: Summons a bear to your side. The bear cub can hold aggro while taunt is on. Pets cannot be summoned via casting and instead will summon automatically outside of combat.

name: Summon Leopard
description: Summons a leopard to your side. The leopard can backstab when behind its target. Pets cannot be summoned via casting and instead will summon automatically outside of combat.

name: Summon Skeletal Minion
description: Summons a skeletal minion to your side. The skeleton will leech life from the enemy and use it to heal your party on every autoattack. Pets cannot be summoned via casting and instead will summon automatically outside of combat.

name: Summon Fire Imp
description: Summons a fire imp to your side. The imp will regularly cast fire effects on its target. Pets cannot be summoned via casting and instead will summon automatically outside of combat.

name: Summon Willowisp
description: Summons a willowisp to your side. The willowisp leeches mana on autoattack and gives it to your party. Pets cannot be summoned via casting and instead will summon automatically outside of combat.

name: Firefist
description: Allows you to proc Ember on a barehanded attack.

name: Inner Focus
description: Increases all proc chance by 50 percent and proc cap by 1.

name: Chi Block
description: Allows you to proc Yawn on a barehanded attack.

name: Open Wounds
description: Slices your target open, instantly dealing 300 percent of both weapons dps and attacks on this target for the next minute will cause them to take 25 percent additional bleed damage over the next 5 ticks

name: Ambidexterous
description: Your dual wield skills are amazing! You cannot fail to dual wield.

name: The Left
description: Feignt your target with your primary weapon to hit them with your offhand weapon, dealing 1000 percent of secondary dps.

name: Armor Rend
description: Slam your weapon onto your opponent dealing 1250 percent primary dps and decreasing their ac by 5 percent of damage dealt for 1.2 minutes.

name: Counterattack
description: You get ready to take advantage of openings, when you are attacked, you strike back with 250 percent of primary dps if the target is in front of you for the next 5 attacks.

name: Reflect
description: When you resist a spell, consume 4 percent of your maximum mana to reflect the spell's damage and effect back to the caster.

name: Thorncoat
description: When you take physical damage, this effect will deal 5 points of damage to the attacker

name: Vengeful Aura
description: You surround yourself in a vengeful aura. All physical damage you take is doubled, but the aura strikes the attacker for the final damage they dealt to you for the next 3 attacks.

name: Taunt
description: Taunts your target, forcing your target to attack you for the next 2 ticks.
